coreJobStatement: Diagnose, treat, and stabilize patients presenting with acute medical and surgical conditions — from initial triage through inpatient care to discharge or transfer to post-acute services.

l6Systems.name: Patient Access & Intake
l6Systems.jobFamily: Receive, identify, and route patients into the care pathway

l6Systems.name: Diagnostics & Assessment
l6Systems.jobFamily: Produce diagnostic findings that determine treatment pathway

l6Systems.name: Surgical & Procedural Intervention
l6Systems.jobFamily: Execute invasive procedures in sterile environments

l6Systems.name: Inpatient Clinical Care
l6Systems.jobFamily: Monitor, treat, and stabilize hospitalized patients

l6Systems.name: Pharmacy & Medication Delivery
l6Systems.jobFamily: Prepare, verify, and dispense medications to point of care

l6Systems.name: Discharge & Care Transition
l6Systems.jobFamily: Coordinate safe patient discharge and hand-off to follow-on care

l6Systems.name: Facility & Building Safety (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain building infrastructure, fire safety, emergency exit security, and physical access control across all clinical and support areas

l6Systems.name: Infection Prevention & Sterilization (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Sterilize instruments, maintain clean environments, control HAI rates across all patient-contact zones

l6Systems.name: Clinical Information Systems (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Provide EMR, CDSS, PACS, lab information, and interoperability infrastructure supporting every care delivery step

vnUnits.name: Patient Registration & EMR System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Register patient identity, insurance, and demographics and create or retrieve the electronic medical record for the care episode

vnUnits.name: ED Management Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Manage emergency department patient flow from triage through treatment to disposition, tracking acuity, wait times, and bed availability

vnUnits.name: Medical Imaging Systems
vnUnits.functionalJob: Acquire diagnostic images of patient anatomy using X-ray, CT, MRI, ultrasound, or nuclear medicine modalities to inform clinical decision-making

vnUnits.name: Laboratory Analyzer Platform
vnUnits.functionalJob: Process blood, tissue, and fluid specimens to produce quantitative diagnostic results for clinical chemistry, hematology, and microbiology

vnUnits.name: Anesthesia Delivery System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Deliver and monitor inhaled anesthetic agents and ventilation to maintain patient unconsciousness and physiological stability during surgical procedures

vnUnits.name: Surgical Table & Positioning
vnUnits.functionalJob: Support and precisely position the patient during surgical procedures with adjustable height, tilt, and articulation for optimal surgical access

vnUnits.name: Patient Monitoring System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Continuously measure and display patient vital signs including heart rate, blood pressure, oxygen saturation, and respiratory rate at the bedside and central station

vnUnits.name: Nurse Call System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Enable patients to request assistance and route calls to the nearest available caregiver based on priority, location, and staff availability

vnUnits.name: Automated Dispensing Cabinet
vnUnits.functionalJob: Securely store and dispense unit-dose medications at the point of care with automated tracking to reduce medication errors and ensure chain-of-custody

vnUnits.name: Fire Detection & Alarm System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Detect fire conditions across all hospital zones and coordinate defend-in-place notification to enable horizontal patient relocation to adjacent smoke compartments

alternatives.name: Siemens Cerberus / Johnson Controls Simplex / Honeywell Notifier

vnUnits.name: Emergency Exit Security Device
vnUnits.functionalJob: Secure emergency exit doors against unauthorized use and patient elopement while preserving single-motion escape and reporting door events to building management

alternatives.name: Wired alarmed exit bars (Von Duprin, Corbin Russwin) / Mechanical door-handle alarm guards (GfS Exit Control, ABUS) / Wireless electronic exit control systems (dormakaba SafeRoute, GEZE SecuLogic) / Electromechanical delayed egress (Allegion)
alternatives.source: No published split; estimated from install base surveys [WEB]

vnUnits.name: Physical Access Control System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Restrict and log physical access to clinical areas, pharmacies, restricted wards, and server rooms through credential-based door authorization

alternatives.name: Wired enterprise ACS (Lenel-S2, Software House, Honeywell Pro-Watch) / Cloud ACS (Brivo, Genetec, Verkada) / Wireless RF ACS (ASSA ABLOY Aperio, dormakaba MATRIX)
alternatives.source: MarketsandMarkets 2025 — top 5 players (ASSA ABLOY, dormakaba, Johnson Controls, Allegion, Honeywell) hold ~70–80% access control market [WEB]

vnUnits.name: Wander Management System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Detect and prevent unauthorized departure of at-risk patients from designated care areas using wearable tags and door-mounted sensors

alternatives.name: Securitas Healthcare / CenTrak / RF Technologies / Accutech Security
alternatives.source: Analyst estimates; dedicated wander mgmt market size not published separately [WEB]

vnUnits.name: Sterile Processing System
vnUnits.functionalJob: Clean, sterilize, and track reusable surgical instruments and devices to prevent healthcare-associated infections and ensure instrument availability for procedures

vnUnits.name: Enterprise BMS / Building Automation
vnUnits.functionalJob: Centrally monitor and control HVAC, medical gas, lighting, and building utilities to maintain clinical environment standards including ASHRAE 170 ventilation requirements

alternatives.name: Siemens Desigo, Honeywell EBI, Schneider EcoStruxure
